The '''Orbitblade-2000''' was an armored aerospace transport manufactured by [[zZip Motor Concepts]]. A four-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] long [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle. It was crewed by a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], carried two passengers and 200 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] of cargo. The vehicle had a flight ceiling of a hundred and fifty [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]]. Below ten kilometers from ground level, it could only achieve sixty hundred and fifty kilometers per hour; at greater heights, it could travel a thousand and fifty kilometers per hour.<ref name="HSCS" />

The craft had a forward [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher, and was one of the few private vehicles to carry armament. Being so lightly-armed, it was seldom used by military or police, instead being used by the companies' enforcers and criminal elements,<ref name="HSCS" /> such as the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]]. It was armored though, comparable to [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation's]] [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeder]], which was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. Unlike the T-47, the Orbitblade's cockpit was environmentally sealed, able to protect the occupants from a [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] atmosphere, such as that on [[Drackmar]].<ref name="BHC">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref>
